title: Fix Customize tab visibility after admin login

requirements.text: Fix the Customize tab (admin navigation button) in the Navbar so it becomes visible immediately after an admin user logs in with Internet Identity. The tab must reliably appear for admin users and remain hidden for non-admin or unauthenticated users.

quotes: i am not able to see it still

acceptanceCriteria: When an admin user logs in via Internet Identity, the Customize tab appears in the navigation bar without requiring a page refresh.
When a non-admin authenticated user logs in, the Customize tab remains hidden.
When no user is logged in, the Customize tab is not visible.
The Customize tab links to the AdminPanel page (/admin or equivalent route).
Logging out hides the Customize tab immediately.

requirements.text: Ensure the admin status check in Navbar.tsx correctly reads from the useIsAdmin query (or equivalent hook in useQueries.ts) and that the query is invalidated and refetched after login so the Customize tab appears reactively. Debug and fix any stale-query or timing issue that prevents the admin flag from being truthy after authentication.

quotes: i am not able to see it still

acceptanceCriteria: After a successful Internet Identity login, the admin status query is refetched automatically.
The Navbar re-renders with the Customize tab as soon as the admin status resolves to true.
No manual page refresh is needed for the tab to appear.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts.
Do not alter the backend admin authorization logic.
Preserve all existing navigation links and their routing.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or tabs.
Changing the visual design of the navigation bar.
Modifying the AdminPanel page content or tabs.
